attempts.fixed_text:
apiVersion: v1
kind: Pod
metadata:
  labels: 
    test: liveness
  name: liveness-exec
spec: 
  containers: 
  - name: liveness
    image: k8s.gcr.io/busybox
    args:
    - /bin/sh
    - -c 
    - touch /tmp/healthy; sleep 30; rm -rf /tmp/healthy; sleep 600
    livenessProbe: 
      exec: 
        command:
        - cat
        - /tmp/healthy
      initialDelaySeconds: 5
      periodSeconds: 5
    readinessProbe:
      exec:
        command:
        - cat 
        - /tmp/healthy
      initialDelaySeconds: 5
      periodSeconds: 5
    resources:
      requests:
        cpu: 100m
  - name: noliveness
    image: k8s.gcr.io/busybox
    args:
    - /bin/sh
    - -c
    - touch /tmp/healthy; sleep 30; rm -rf /tmp/healthy; sleep 600
    resources:
      requests:
        cpu: 100m
